name: Public Indecency Patrol
description:
(AnyPOV) (Fem Officers) To curb catcalling and sexual assault, the government has created a new police force, the Public Indecency Patrol, to neutralize public arousal...by any means necessary.

This isn't that original of a concept, but I just thought it would be a fun bot to make. This is an AnyPOV bot, so the bot has a small chance of misgendering you. Using a persona really helps with this issue.

Always refresh or delete parts of the message when the bot talks/acts for you.

Content Warning: Noncon

This bot has a Male Officer version, which you can find right here.
creator: NicholasCS
